creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks for reporting.

1. Upstream later re-taged this release, so this isn't reflecting the 'actual' relase.

84070120 - (tag: 2.5.65.actual) Merge pull request #1778 from veg/develop
b8748173 - Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin' into develop
7f8963c3 - MSS improvements, RELAX bug fix, optimization procedure tweaks
c1a2dd1f - Issue 1777 fix
0abf1c4c - (tag: 2.5.65, tag: 2.5.64) Merge pull request #1766 from veg/develop

2. There is an upstream regression that I would like to fix before upgrading.

https://github.com/veg/hyphy/issues/1779

3. This is a duplicate of bug #283452, where I mention that I already have this update queued.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 283452 ***
